description:
ir_typer.rs numeric_result_fold: the Div and Mod arms compute bi.checked_rem(1) before the actual divide. checked_rem(n, 1) is always Some(0) — it can never return None (divisor 1 is never zero). The only real guard is the subsequent .filter(|_| bi != 0). Replace:
  bi.checked_rem(1).filter(|_| bi != 0).and(ai.checked_div(bi))
with:
  if bi != 0 { ai.checked_div(bi) } else { None }
Same for Mod. No behavior change.
title: remove dead bi.checked_rem(1) from numeric_result_fold
